title: Use credentials from kpod login for buildah
body:
buildah push and from now use the credentials stored in ${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR}/containers/auth.json by kpod login
if the auth file path is changed, buildah push and from can get the credentials from the custom auth file
using the --authfile flag
e.g buildah push --authfile /tmp/auths/myauths.json alpine docker://username/image

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: @umohnani8 buildah bud needs this support also.
A few doc nits.  If we add references to kpod to the man pages, we'll need to remember to circle back and touch those up once the name changes.
Added authifle to buildah bud also

:pushpin: Commit a70bad9 has been approved by `rhatdan`
